docking_quarter.name: The Docking Quarter
docking_quarter.vibe: Seedy bars, shady merchants, the docks never close.

the_grid.name: The Grid
the_grid.vibe: Tech and hacker district — neon, underground clubs.

the_shallows.name: The Shallows
the_shallows.vibe: Lower city — working class, markets, danger.
